headings.usage: Use Outfit for all H1, H2, H3, and major callout text. It provides a highly structural, modern tech/crypto aesthetic. Avoid Inter/Roboto.

body.usage: Use Manrope for paragraphs, labels, and table data. Highly readable and complements Outfit.

colors.strategy: Avoid generic pink-to-purple gradients. Use Deep Obsidian (#050505) as the anchor. Pair with Pure White for data clarity and Electric Cyan (#00E5FF) as the kinetic, high-visibility trigger. This achieves the 'Performance Pro / Crypto' aesthetic similar to Stake or Linear.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl or 2xl heavily on the Header, Floating FAB, and top-level overlays. Ensure a 1px solid inner stroke (border-white/10) to define the edge.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use soft radial gradients behind key components (like the Hero text or the FAB). Example: absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_center,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-cyan-500/15 via-transparent to-transparent.
visual_enhancers.borders: Instead of soft box shadows, rely on 1px solid strokes (border-white/5) or grid structures to create hierarchy.
visual_enhancers.textures: Include a subtle noise overlay on the body background if possible, or keep it pure #050505 for OLED black crispness.

bento_grid.items: Use col-span-12 md:col-span-8 for wide feature cards, md:col-span-4 for tall/square cards.
bento_grid.padding: Use generous padding: p-6 md:p-8 on inside cards.

grids_layouts.spacing: Use p-20 to p-32 between major sections to give the design breathing room.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items and hero content using framer-motion or simple tailwind animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 fade-in duration-700.
motion.hover: Cards should slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and their borders should brighten (border-white/20) on hover. Buttons should scale 98% on active.
motion.ticker: The bottom OrderTicker must use a continuous smooth linear infinite scroll (react-fast-marquee).

header.style: Fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-white/5
header.content: Left: 'Better Social' Brand Logo. Center/Right: Currency toggle (USD/EUR), Language picker (EN/ES/etc). Right: 'Client Area' CTA (glassy) and 'Order Now' CTA (solid cyan).
header.instruction: Do NOT hide all links in a hamburger menu on desktop. Ensure no transparent background blocks readability.

hero.layout: Centered, high impact, massive negative space.
hero.headline: Growth done obnoxiously well. (or similar punchy rewrite). Use text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-white/60.
hero.subtitle: No login. Instant delivery. Crypto & Cards accepted. The #1 provider for TikTok, IG, and YouTube growth.
hero.ctas: Primary: Solid Cyan bg, black text, pulsing glow. Secondary: Glassy outline, white text.
hero.decoration: Place a massive, subtle radial glow in the background behind the hero text.

cards: Instant Delivery (col-span-8) - Show a visual mock of a progress bar hitting 100% instantly.
Crypto + Coupon (col-span-4) - Show Bitcoin/ETH/Tether icons floating.
Anonymous Checkout (col-span-4) - Mask icon or blurred identity visual.
1000+ Services (col-span-8) - A dense scrolling list of service names fading out at edges.

workflow.title: How It Works
workflow.layout: 4-step horizontal process. Flex container with connecting dashed SVG lines. Step numbers should be glowing cyan circles.

catalog_embed.title: Live Services
catalog_embed.style: Sleek, high-density table or card grid fetching from /api/services. Use 1px border cards, dark transparent backgrounds. Very functional, 'Terminal' or 'Admin' clean look.

payment_methods.style: Marquee or grid of supported methods. NOWPayments, Selly logos, plus top cryptos (BTC, LTC, ETH). Grayscale icons that colorize on hover.

faq.style: Accordion (shadcn). Clean 1px bottom border per item. No boxes, just sleek lines. Title on left, plus/minus icon on right.

floating_fab.style: Fixed bottom-4 right-4 z-50. Pill-shaped or circular. backdrop-blur-xl bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-500/30 p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.2)] hover:bg-cyan-500/30 transition-all cursor-pointer.
floating_fab.content: Lucide MessageCircle or Bot icon. Add a pinging green dot (absolute -top-1 -right-1) to indicate 'Online'.

order_ticker.style: Fixed or relative at the very bottom above footer. h-10 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-t border-white/5 flex items-center.
order_ticker.content: Continuous marquee showing '🎉 User b*** bought 5000 TikTok Followers'. Text should be small, text-zinc-400, highlighting the service in white or cyan.

footer.content: Massive 'BETTER SOCIAL' watermark text. Legal links, contact email, dev credit ('BK & Sinester').

abstract_metallic_waves.description: Smooth dark 3D waves. Use with low opacity (10-20%) inside bento grid cards for high-end texture.

illuminated_geometric.description: Dark abstract illuminated geometric shapes. Good for the 'Crypto' or 'Tech' bento card background.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Keep all existing `data-testid` attributes on interactive elements.
CRITICAL: Do NOT break existing routing (/, /client, /admin, /order/:id).
CRITICAL: Keep the Better Social brand name, Currency toggle, Language picker, and Client Area CTA.
Do not use Space Grotesk, Inter, or Roboto for headings. Import and use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text.
Implement the 'OrderTicker' component as a continuous marquee using react-fast-marquee or CSS keyframes.
For all glassy elements, ensure you use both backdrop-blur-xl AND a semi-transparent background (e.g. bg-[#0a0a0a]/60). Never use fully transparent backgrounds for headers or overlays.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide-react (Lucide preferred since it's in the current stack).
Ensure contrast ratios are met. Dark text on Cyan buttons, white text on dark backgrounds.
Avoid standard Vercel/Stripe looking shadow-based cards. Use 1px borders (border-white/5) and very subtle backgrounds (bg-white/[0.02]) for the Bento Grid.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
You MUST NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }`.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp buttons with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Always include `data-testid` for buttons, links, and forms.
